name: carbon
description: Carbon Design System component explorer — HTML/React/Vue sources generated from the real @carbon packages

scripts.stories: node scripts/fetch-stories.mjs && node scripts/fetch-wc-stories.mjs && node scripts/fetch-vue-stories.mjs && node scripts/fetch-mdx-docs.mjs && node scripts/extract-vue-templates.mjs && node scripts/extract-official-demos.mjs && node scripts/extract-overview.mjs
scripts.generate: node scripts/generate.mjs && node scripts/apply-vue-overrides.mjs && node scripts/generate-readmes.mjs
scripts.build: npm run extract && npm run bundle && npm run generate
